name: grizzly-gate
description: Run the grizzly-gate local pre-check, read its report.json, and optionally block pushes of un-gated code.

block_push.title: Block git push on gate failure
block_push.description: When on, Claude's `git push` runs the local gate first and a failing gate blocks the push. Off by default — the gate stays available as /grizzly-gate:check.

warn_unsupported.title: Warn on un-adapted languages at session start
warn_unsupported.description: When on, a session in a repo containing code the gate has no adapter for shows a heads-up that the gate will fail closed. Advisory only.

warn_suppression.title: Warn when an edit adds a lint suppression
warn_suppression.description: When on, edits that add any lint suppression are flagged — blanket ones (#[allow], bare # noqa, @ts-ignore) as forbidden, scoped reasoned ones as still-needs-sign-off. Claude is told to refactor rather than suppress and to confirm with you before keeping one. Advisory only.
